_**User (2025-10-22 20:41:39Z)**_

I need to add simple sorting, pagination and filtering by columns in all admin tables. How would you handle it with as least amount of code as possible.

---

_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.5)**_

Looking at your requirements and the Phoenix LiveView guidelines, I'd recommend using **Flop** - a library specifically designed for this use case with minimal code.

## Recommended Approach: Flop Library

Flop provides sorting, pagination, and filtering with minimal boilerplate. Here's how to implement it:

### 1. Add Flop to dependencies

````elixir
// filepath: mix.exs
defp deps do
  [
    # ...existing code...
    {:flop, "~> 0.25.0"},
    {:flop_phoenix, "~> 0.22.0"}
  ]
end
````

### 2. Configure Flop in your context

````elixir
// filepath: lib/cozy_checkout/orders.ex
defmodule CozyCheckout.Orders do
  import Ecto.Query
  alias CozyCheckout.Repo
  alias CozyCheckout.Orders.Order

  # Add Flop to your schema
  @derive {
    Flop.Schema,
    filterable: [:order_number, :status, :inserted_at],
    sortable: [:order_number, :inserted_at, :total_amount],
    default_limit: 20
  }

  def list_orders_with_flop(flop \\ %Flop{}) do
    Order
    |> join(:inner, [o], b in assoc(o, :booking))
    |> join(:inner, [o, b], g in assoc(b, :guest))
    |> preload([o, b, g], booking: {b, guest: g})
    |> where([o], is_nil(o.deleted_at))
    |> Flop.validate_and_run(flop, for: Order)
  end
end
````

### 3. Update your LiveView

````elixir
// filepath: lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/pohoda_export_live/index.ex
defmodule CozyCheckoutWeb.PohodaExportLive.Index do
  use CozyCheckoutWeb, :live_view
  alias CozyCheckout.Orders

  def mount(_params, _session, socket) do
    {:ok,
     socket
     |> assign(:date_from, Date.utc_today() |> Date.beginning_of_month() |> Date.to_string())
     |> assign(:date_to, Date.utc_today() |> Date.to_string())
     |> assign(:selected_orders, MapSet.new())
     |> assign(:meta, %Flop.Meta{})}
  end

  def handle_params(params, _uri, socket) do
    case Orders.list_orders_with_flop(params) do
      {:ok, {orders, meta}} ->
        {:noreply,
         socket
         |> assign(:orders, orders)
         |> assign(:meta, meta)}

      {:error, meta} ->
        {:noreply, assign(socket, meta: meta)}
    end
  end

  def handle_event("load_orders", params, socket) do
    {:noreply,
     socket
     |> assign(:date_from, params["date_from"])
     |> assign(:date_to, params["date_to"])
     |> push_patch(to: ~p"/admin/pohoda_export")}
  end

  # ...existing code...
end
````

### 4. Update your template with Flop components

````heex
// filepath: lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/pohoda_export_live/index.html.heex
<Layouts.app flash={@flash}>
  <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
    <!-- ...existing code... -->

    <div class="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm overflow-hidden mb-6">
      <!-- Filter form -->
      <div class="p-4 border-b border-slate-200">
        <Flop.Phoenix.filter_fields :let={f} form={:orders} fields={[:order_number, :status]} meta={@meta}>
          <div class="flex gap-4 items-end">
            <div class="flex-1">
              <.input field={f[:order_number]} type="text" label="Order Number" />
            </div>
            <button type="submit" class="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg">
              Filter
            </button>
          </div>
        </Flop.Phoenix.filter_fields>
      </div>

      <div class="overflow-x-auto">
        <Flop.Phoenix.table items={@orders} meta={@meta} path={~p"/admin/pohoda_export"}>
          <:col :let={order} label="Select" field={:id}>
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              checked={MapSet.member?(@selected_orders, order.id)}
              phx-click="toggle_order"
              phx-value-order-id={order.id}
              class="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 border-slate-300 rounded focus:ring-blue-500"
            />
          </:col>
          <:col :let={order} label="Order Number" field={:order_number}>
            {order.order_number}
          </:col>
          <:col :let={order} label="Guest">
            {order.booking.guest.name}
          </:col>
          <:col :let={order} label="Date" field={:inserted_at}>
            {Calendar.strftime(order.inserted_at, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")}
          </:col>
          <:col :let={order} label="Items">
            {Enum.count(order.order_items)}
          </:col>
          <:col :let={order} label="Total" field={:total_amount}>
            {format_currency(order.total_amount)}
          </:col>
        </Flop.Phoenix.table>
      </div>

      <!-- Pagination -->
      <div class="p-4 border-t border-slate-200">
        <Flop.Phoenix.pagination meta={@meta} path={~p"/admin/pohoda_export"} />
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ...existing code... -->
  </div>
</Layouts.app>
````

## Benefits of Flop

✅ **Minimal code** - handles sorting, filtering, and pagination automatically  
✅ **URL-based** - all state in query params (shareable links)  
✅ **Type-safe** - validates parameters  
✅ **Customizable** - easy to style with Tailwind  
✅ **Ecto integration** - works directly with queries  

This approach will work across all your admin tables with consistent behavior and minimal duplication.

_**User (2025-10-22 20:50:36Z)**_

I tried to open bookings page but got this:
no Ecto repo configured

You attempted to call `Flop.all/3` (or its equivalent in a Flop
backend module), but no Ecto repo was specified.

Specify the repo in one of the following ways.

Explicitly pass the repo to the function:

    Flop.all(MyApp.Item, %Flop{}, repo: MyApp.Repo)

Set a global default repo in your config:

    config :flop, repo: MyApp.Repo

Define a backend module and pass the repo as an option:

    defmodule MyApp.Flop do
      use Flop, repo: MyApp.Repo
    end

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **replace_string_in_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- filePath: `/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/booking_live/index.ex`
- newString:

```
  @impl true
  def handle_event("filter", params, socket) do
    # Transform the filter params to Flop format
    filter_params = transform_filter_params(params)
    
    # Merge with current sorting
    params =
      case socket.assigns.meta.flop.order_by do
        nil -> filter_params
        order_by -> 
          filter_params
          |> Map.put("order_by", order_by)
          |> Map.put("order_directions", socket.assigns.meta.flop.order_directions)
      end

    {:noreply, push_patch(socket, to: ~p"/admin/bookings?#{params}")}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("clear_filters", _params, socket) do
    # Keep sorting but clear filters
    params =
      case socket.assigns.meta.flop.order_by do
        nil -> %{}
        order_by -> %{"order_by" => order_by, "order_directions" => socket.assigns.meta.flop.order_directions}
      end

    {:noreply, push_patch(socket, to: ~p"/admin/bookings?#{params}")}
  end

  # Transform nested filter params from the form to Flop's expected format
  defp transform_filter_params(%{"filters" => filters}) do
    filters
    |> Enum.flat_map(fn
      {field, %{} = operators} ->
        Enum.map(operators, fn {op, value} ->
          if value != "" and not String.starts_with?(op, "_unused_") do
            %{
              "field" => field,
              "op" => op,
              "value" => value
            }
          else
            nil
          end
        end)
        |> Enum.reject(&is_nil/1)
    end)
    |> case do
      [] -> %{}
      filter_list -> %{"filters" => filter_list}
    end
  end

  defp transform_filter_params(_), do: %{}
```

- oldString:

```

        nil -> %{}
        order_by -> %{"order_by" => order_by, "order_directions" => socket.assigns.meta.flop.order_directions}
      end

    {:noreply, push_patch(socket, to: ~p"/admin/bookings?#{params}")}
  end
```


</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.5)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **replace_string_in_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- filePath: `/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/booking_live/index.ex`
- newString:

```
  defp build_sort_path(meta, field) do
    current_params = build_current_params(meta)
    direction = if is_sorted_asc?(meta, field), do: :desc, else: :asc

    params =
      current_params
      |> Map.put("order_by", to_string(field))
      |> Map.put("order_directions", to_string(direction))

    ~p"/admin/bookings?#{params}"
  end

  # Build current query params from meta (for preserving filters/sorting when navigating)
  defp build_current_params(meta) do
    params = %{}

    # Add filters
    params =
      if meta.flop.filters != [] do
        filter_params =
          Enum.map(meta.flop.filters, fn filter ->
            %{
              "field" => to_string(filter.field),
              "op" => to_string(filter.op),
              "value" => filter.value
            }
          end)

        Map.put(params, "filters", filter_params)
      else
        params
      end

    # Add sorting
    params =
      if meta.flop.order_by do
        params
        |> Map.put("order_by", meta.flop.order_by)

  defp build_sort_path(meta, field) do
    current_params = Flop.Phoenix.build_path(meta, [])
    direction = if is_sorted_asc?(meta, field), do: :desc, else: :asc

    params =
      current_params
      |> Map.put("order_by", to_string(field))
      |> Map.put("order_directions", to_string(direction))

    ~p"/admin/bookings?#{params}"
  end
```

- newString:

```
  # Build current query params from meta (for preserving filters/sorting when navigating)
  defp build_current_params(meta) do
    params = %{}

    # Add filters in Flop's expected format
    params =
      if meta.flop.filters != [] do
        filter_params =
          meta.flop.filters
          |> Enum.with_index()
          |> Enum.reduce(%{}, fn {filter, idx}, acc ->
            Map.merge(acc, %{
              "filters[#{idx}][field]" => to_string(filter.field),
              "filters[#{idx}][op]" => to_string(filter.op),
              "filters[#{idx}][value]" => to_string(filter.value)
            })
          end)

        Map.merge(params, filter_params)
      else
        params
      end

    # Add sorting
    params =
      if meta.flop.order_by do
        params
        |> Map.put("order_by", List.first(meta.flop.order_by))
        |> Map.put("order_directions", List.first(meta.flop.order_directions))
      else
        params
      end

    params
  end
```

- oldString:

```
  # Build current query params from meta (for preserving filters/sorting when navigating)
  defp build_current_params(meta) do
    params = %{}

    # Add filters
    params =
      if meta.flop.filters != [] do
        filter_params =
          Enum.map(meta.flop.filters, fn filter ->
            %{
              "field" => to_string(filter.field),
              "op" => to_string(filter.op),
              "value" => filter.value
            }
          end)

        Map.put(params, "filters", filter_params)
      else
        params
      end

    # Add sorting
    params =
      if meta.flop.order_by do
        params
        |> Map.put("order_by", meta.flop.order_by)
        |> Map.put("order_directions", meta.flop.order_directions)
      else
        params
      end

    params
  end

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **replace_string_in_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- filePath: `/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/booking_live/index.ex`
- newString:

```
  # Transform nested filter params from the form to Flop's expected format
  defp transform_filter_params(%{"filters" => filters}) do
    filter_list =
      filters
      |> Enum.flat_map(fn
        {field, %{} = operators} ->
          Enum.map(operators, fn {op, value} ->
            if value != "" and not String.starts_with?(op, "_unused_") do
              %{
                "field" => field,
                "op" => op,
                "value" => value
              }
            else
              nil
            end
          end)
          |> Enum.reject(&is_nil/1)
      end)
      |> Enum.with_index()
      |> Enum.reduce(%{}, fn {filter, idx}, acc ->
        Map.merge(acc, %{
          "filters[#{idx}][field]" => filter["field"],
          "filters[#{idx}][op]" => filter["op"],
          "filters[#{idx}][value]" => filter["value"]
        })
      end)

    case filter_list do
      empty when empty == %{} -> %{}
      params -> params
    end
  end

  defp transform_filter_params(_), do: %{}
```

- oldString:

```
  # Transform nested filter params from the form to Flop's expected format
  defp transform_filter_params(%{"filters" => filters}) do
    filters
    |> Enum.flat_map(fn
      {field, %{} = operators} ->
        Enum.map(operators, fn {op, value} ->
          if value != "" and not String.starts_with?(op, "_unused_") do
            %{
              "field" => field,
              "op" => op,
              "value" => value
            }
          else
            nil
          end
        end)
        |> Enum.reject(&is_nil/1)
    end)
    |> case do
      [] -> %{}
      filter_list -> %{"filters" => filter_list}
    end
  end

  defp transform_filter_params(_), do: %{}
```

  defp build_current_params(meta) do
    params = %{}

    # Add filters
    params =
      if meta.flop.filters && meta.flop.filters != [] do
        Enum.reduce(meta.flop.filters, params, fn filter, acc ->
          put_in(acc, ["filters", to_string(filter.field), to_string(filter.op)], filter.value)
        end)
      else
        params
      end

    # Add pagination
    params =
      if meta.current_page && meta.current_page > 1 do
        Map.put(params, "page", to_string(meta.current_page))
      else
        params
      end

    # Add sorting
    params =
      if meta.order_by do
        Map.put(params, "order_by", to_string(meta.order_by))
      else
        params
      end

    params
  end
```


</details></tool-use>
